lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਚੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੰ ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਹ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: jaachant naanak kripaal prasaadan neh bisarant neh bisarant naaraaeinah |21|
lines.english: Nanak begs for this blessing from the Merciful Lord, that he may never forget Him, never forget Him. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬਸੰਤ ਬਾਸੁਦੇਵਹ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt basant baasudevah paarabraham paramesurah |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent, Luminous Lord, dwells in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਸਮਰਥੰ ਨਹ ਸੇਵਕੰ ਨਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਰਮ ਪੁਰਖੋਤਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: neh samarathan neh sevakan neh preet param purakhotaman |
lines.english: I have no power; I do not serve You, and I do not love You, O Supreme Sublime Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਵ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਿਮਰਤੇ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੰ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: tav prasaad simarate naaman naanak kripaal har har guran |22|
lines.english: By Your Grace, Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Merciful Lord, Har, Har. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਣ ਪੋਖਣ ਕਰੰਤ ਜੀਆ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਛਾਦਨ ਦੇਵੰਤ ਦਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: bharan pokhan karant jeea bisraam chhaadan devant daanan |
lines.english: The Lord feeds and sustains all living beings; He blesses them gifts of restful peace and fine clothes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤੰਤਿ ਸੁਖ ਆਨੰਦ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਹ ॥ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥ ਅਨਿਤੵ ਰਚਨਾ ਨਿਰਮੋਹ ਤੇ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: varatant sukh aanand prasaadah | simarant naanak har har hare | anitay rachanaa niramoh te |23|
lines.english: By His Grace, mortals abide in peace and bliss. O Nanak, meditating in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har, Haray, The mortal is released from attachment to the world. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਜੰਤ ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮ ਚਤੁਰ ਚੇਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: srijant ratan janam chatur chetanah |
lines.english: He created the jewel of human life, with all its cleverness and intelligence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਪਰੀਤ ਬੁਧੵੰ ਮਾਰਤ ਲੋਕਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿਰੰਕਾਲ ਦੁਖ ਭੋਗਤੇ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: bipareet budhayan maarat lokah naanak chirankaal dukh bhogate |24|
lines.english: Those cruel-minded rulers who oppress the people, O Nanak, shall suffer in pain for a very long time. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨੰ ਪਰਾ ਪੂਰਬੇਣ ਭੁੰਚੰਤੇ ਮਹੀਪਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: daanan paraa pooraben bhunchante maheepate |
lines.english: The kings of the earth are eating up the blessings of the good karma of their past lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਜਸੵ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਰਿਦੰਤਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: brithaa anugrahan gobindah jasay simaran ridantarah |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the Lord in their hearts, look upon even pain as God's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਰੋਗੵੰ ਮਹਾ ਰੋਗੵੰ ਬਿਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤੇ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਯਹ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: aarogayan mahaa rogayan bisimrite karunaa mayah |25|
lines.english: The healthy person is very sick, if he does not remember the Lord, the Embodiment of Mercy. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਮਣੰ ਕੇਵਲੰ ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਸੁਧਰਮੰ ਦੇਹ ਧਾਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: ramanan kevalan keeratanan sudharaman deh dhaaranah |
lines.english: To sing the Kirtan of God's Praises is the righteous duty incurred by taking birth in this human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਣ ਸੀਲ ਸੰਤੰ ਸਮ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਸੵ ਦੁਰਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sehan seel santan sam mitrasay durajanah |
lines.english: The Saints are tolerant and good-natured; friends and enemies are the same to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੀਵਤੰ ਸੰਤ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: amrit naam naaraaein naanak peevatan sant na tripayate |26|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is Ambrosial Nectar, O Nanak. The Saints drink it in, and never have enough of it. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਰਸਕਾਰ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਮਾਨ ਭੰਗਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: tirasakaar neh bhavant neh bhavant maan bhanganah |
lines.english: They pay no attention to dishonor or disrespect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋਜਨ ਅਨਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਰੇਣ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਆਵਧ ਹੋਇ ਉਪਤਿਸਟਤੇ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak bhojan anik prakaaren nindak aavadh hoe upatisattate |27|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is all the same to them, whether someone offers them all sorts of foods, or slanders them, or draws weapons to kill them. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਭਾ ਹੀਨ ਨਹ ਭਵੰਤਿ ਨਹ ਪੋਹੰਤਿ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਦੁਖਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sobhaa heen neh bhavant neh pohant sansaar dukhanah |
lines.english: They are not bothered by gossip; the miseries of the world do not touch them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮ ਜਪੰਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸੁਖ ਬਾਸਨਹ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: gobind naam japant mil saadh sangah naanak se praanee sukh baasanah |28|
lines.english: Those who join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and chant the Name of the Lord of the Universe - O Nanak, those mortals abide in peace. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈਨਾ ਸਾਧ ਸਮੂਹ ਸੂਰ ਅਜਿਤੰ ਸੰਨਾਹੰ ਤਨਿ ਨਿੰਮ੍ਰਤਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: sainaa saadh samooh soor ajitan sanaahan tan ninmrataah |
lines.english: The Holy people are an invincible army of spiritual warriors; their bodies are protected by the armor of humility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਧਹ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਮਣੰ ਓਟ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਕਰ ਚਰਮਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: aavadhah gun gobind ramanan ott gurasabad kar charamanah |
lines.english: Their weapons are the Glorious Praises of the Lord which they chant; their Shelter and Shield is the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਰੂੜਤੇ ਅਸ੍ਵ ਰਥ ਨਾਗਹ ਬੁਝੰਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਰਗਹ ॥
lines.translit: aaroorrate asv rath naagah bujhante prabh maaragah |
lines.english: The horses, chariots and elephants they ride are their way to realize God's Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤਤੇ ਬਿਸ੍ਵ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਸੵੰ ਕਰੋਤਿ ਪੰਚ ਤਸਕਰਹ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: jitate bisv sansaarah naanak vasayan karot panch tasakarah |29|
lines.english: They conquer the entire world, O Nanak, and overpower the five thieves. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਚਰਤੇ ਨਿਰਭਯੰ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਸੈਨਾ ਧਾਯੰਤੇ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: bicharate nirabhayan satru sainaa dhaayante goupaal keeratanah |
lines.english: They walk fearlessly through the armies of their enemies; they attack them with the Kirtan of God's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਨਗਰੰ ਦ੍ਰੁਮ ਛਾਯਾ ਰਚਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿਹ ॥
lines.translit: mrig trisanaa gandharab nagaran drum chhaayaa rach duramatih |
lines.english: Misled by evil-mindedness, mortals are engrossed in the mirage of the illusory world, like the passing shade of a tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਮੋਹ ਮਿਥੵਾ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਹ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: tatah kuttanb moh mithayaa simarant naanak raam raam naamah |30|
lines.english: Emotional attachment to family is false, so Nanak meditates in remembrance on the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਿਗਮੰ ਨਚ ਗੁਣਗੵ ਨਾਮ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach bidiaa nidhaan nigaman nach gunagay naam keeratanah |
lines.english: I do not possess the treasure of the wisdom of the Vedas, nor do I possess the merits of the Praises of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਗ ਉਦਿਮ ਲਬਧੵੰ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਖਲ ਪੰਡਿਤਹ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: bhaag udim labadhayan maaeaa naanak saadhasang khal pandditah |31|
lines.english: By destiny and hard work, the wealth of Maya is obtained. O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, even fools become religious scholars. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਰਾਗ ਰਤਨ ਕੰਠੰ ਨਹ ਚੰਚਲ ਚਤੁਰ ਚਾਤੁਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach raag ratan kantthan neh chanchal chatur chaaturah |
lines.english: I do not have a beautiful voice to sing jewelled melodies; I am not clever, wise or shrewd.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਹ ਭਣਿ ਜੋ ਉਤਮ ਸਲੋਕ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਨੈਨ ਨੰਦਨੀ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: jeeh bhan jo utam salok udharanan nain nandanee |32|
lines.english: Chanting this most Sublime Word brings salvation and joy to the eyes. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠ ਰਮਣੀਯ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਮਾਲਾ ਹਸਤ ਊਚ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਧਾਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: kantth ramaneey raam raam maalaa hasat aooch prem dhaaranee |
lines.english: The mala around my neck is the chanting of the Lord's Name. The Love of the Lord is my silent chanting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰ ਹੀਣਸੵ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੰਤ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਸਟਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: gur mantr heenasay jo praanee dhrigant janam bhrasattanah |
lines.english: That mortal who lacks the Guru's Mantra - cursed and contaminated is his life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਕਰਹ ਸੂਕਰਹ ਗਰਧਭਹ ਕਾਕਹ ਸਰਪਨਹ ਤੁਲਿ ਖਲਹ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: kookarah sookarah garadhabhah kaakah sarapanah tul khalah |33|
lines.english: That blockhead is just a dog, a pig, a jackass, a crow, a snake. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਨੰ ਰਿਦਯੰ ਨਾਮ ਧਾਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: charanaarabind bhajanan ridayan naam dhaaranah |
lines.english: Whoever contemplates the Lord's Lotus Feet, and enshrines His Name within the heart,
